channel.title: Blockchain on Abhinav Agarwalla
channel.description: Recent content in Blockchain on Abhinav Agarwalla

item.title: Hackathon win @ETHNewDelhi'25
item.description: Attended an IRL hackathon in New Delhi. Built a p2p federated learning platform using libp2p(-py), Akave-O3 and Hedera hashgraph. Won the Filecoin/Akave track at ETHNewDelhi'25.

item.title: Weekend hackathon win
item.description: Participated in a hackathon over the weekend. Built a cool event hosting platform on Vara blockchain. Won a 1st prize in the beginner track. Getting more comfortable working under tight constraints.

item.title: Wrote on Nillion's Blind Computation API
item.description: Wrote a blog on my contribution to our project in @EthOnline'24 hackthon, on Nillion’s blind computation API.

item.title: Hackathon win @EthSingapore'24
item.description: First time travel to Singapore, amazing country. Won a prize building on Oasis ROFL API with team.

item.title: Hackathon win @EthOnline'24
item.description: Participated in my first hackathon. Won a prize in Nillion track building on its blind compuation API.

item.title: Completed Summer of Bitcoin '24
item.description:
Got selected for Summer of Bitcoin 2024, contributing to Floresta, a lightweight bitcoin client.

Learned a lot about navigating large codebases and p2p mechanics used in decentralized systems.

item.title: First open source fellowship
item.description:
Got selected for Summer of Bitcoin 2024. First real step into working on open source projects in a structured way.

Wrote a blog about the selection process too.
